sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: This Acceptable Use Policy ("AUP") sets out the rules governing the use of TripFi's platform, services, website, and APIs (collectively, "Services"). By using our Services, you agree to comply with this policy. TripFi reserves the right to suspend or terminate access for any user who violates this policy.

sections.heading: Permitted Uses
sections.content: You may use our Services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with our Terms of Service. Permitted uses include:
list: Searching for and booking travel for yourself or others with their explicit consent
Using our AI travel planner for personal travel planning
Accessing your account information and booking history
Communicating with our support team
Sharing travel content through legitimate social features of the platform

sections.heading: Prohibited Activities
sections.content: You must not use our Services to engage in any of the following activities:

subsections.heading: Fraudulent Activities
subsections.content: Any form of fraud is strictly prohibited, including:
list: Making fraudulent bookings with stolen or invalid payment methods
Creating fake accounts or impersonating other individuals
Providing false information to obtain discounts or benefits
Attempting to manipulate our pricing algorithms

subsections.heading: Technical Abuse
subsections.content: The following technical abuses are prohibited:
list: Automated scraping, crawling, or data harvesting of our platform
Reverse engineering, decompiling, or disassembling any part of our software
Attempting to probe, scan, or test for vulnerabilities
Introducing malware, viruses, or any malicious code
Attempting to gain unauthorised access to our systems or other users' accounts
Overloading our infrastructure through denial-of-service attacks or excessive API requests

subsections.heading: Harmful Content
subsections.content: You must not use our platform to distribute or transmit:
list: Content that is defamatory, abusive, harassing, or threatening
Content that promotes discrimination based on race, gender, religion, nationality, or other characteristics
Spam or unsolicited commercial communications
Content that infringes intellectual property rights of any party

subsections.heading: Illegal Activities
subsections.content: The following illegal activities are strictly prohibited:
list: Facilitating money laundering or other financial crimes
Using the platform to evade sanctions or export controls
Booking travel for or assisting individuals on government watchlists
Any activity that violates applicable local, national, or international law

sections.heading: Enforcement
sections.content: TripFi reserves the right to investigate and take appropriate action against any violation of this policy, including:
list: Temporary or permanent suspension of your account
Cancellation of any affected bookings without refund
Reporting to law enforcement or regulatory authorities
Civil action for damages caused by your violation

sections.heading: Reporting Violations
sections.content: If you become aware of any violation of this Acceptable Use Policy, please report it to us immediately. We take all reports seriously and will investigate promptly.
